The '''Imperial Mining Corporation''' was a corporation affiliated with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] with branches in several [[Star system/Legends|systems]] and headquarters on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

{{Company-stub}}
